iterations.label: baseline
iterations.notes: Major issues: merged spines, single-observation query selection, single OCR orientation

iterations.label: sensitive-peaks
iterations.notes: Too many false splits (48 detected). All-text query includes garbage. But found Meditations, East of Eden separated.

iterations.label: middle-ground-peaks-dual-ocr
iterations.changes: peakThreshold=0.05, valleyDepth=0.50, minPeakDist=0.015, dual orientation OCR (.right/.left), largest-bbox query with author
iterations.notes: Dual OCR orientation fixed Sol Majestic. Tell Me Everything now separated. Some non-Latin hallucinations (Thai).

iterations.label: padding-nonlatin-filter-tighter-width
iterations.changes: maxWidthFraction=0.12, horizontal padding 30% for narrow crops, non-Latin text filter, contour width filter
iterations.notes: Padding was huge win: God Equation, Can American Capitalism, Reverberation now readable. But lost Monte Cristo (maxWidth too tight).

iterations.label: edge-peaks-full-coverage
iterations.changes: maxWidthFraction=0.20, added implicit edge peaks at x=0 and x=imageWidth for full shelf coverage
iterations.notes: Monte Cristo back via edge peaks. Non-Latin filter removed 2 garbage entries.

iterations.label: first-metadata-test
iterations.notes: Google Books API disabled (403). Open Library title= param fails with combined queries. Fixed OL to use q= param.

iterations.label: final-search-optimization
iterations.changes: Combined title+author query with retry strategy: clean punctuation, remove short words (>=4 chars), try both cleaned and original query on both providers

parameters.ocrOrientation: dual (right + left, pick higher avg confidence)

mergedSpines: Talking to My Daughter About the Economy
undetectable: This Boy's Life (gold cover, minimal spine text)
wrongSearchResult: Genius (query 'GENIUS JAMES' too generic for OL)

keyWins: Dual OCR orientation (left/right) improved reading of rotated text
Horizontal padding for narrow crops dramatically improved OCR quality
Non-Latin text filter eliminated hallucinated Thai/Arabic OCR
Edge peaks ensured full shelf coverage (leftmost/rightmost books)
Open Library q= search instead of title= fixed metadata resolution
Query retry with cleaned text (remove short words) caught more matches
remainingLimitations: Merged thin books (Meditations + Nervous Energy + Talking to My Daughter) - need better peak resolution or different segmentation
OCR errors on narrow/dark spines (missing first letters, character substitutions)
Generic single-word queries (GENIUS) return wrong Open Library results
This Boy's Life has minimal visible spine text (gold cover)
Google Books API disabled - would likely improve results if enabled
recommendedNextSteps: Enable Google Books API in GCP console for much better search results
Consider SAM-based segmentation for the merged spine regions
Try VNRecognizeTextRequest with revision3 for improved OCR accuracy
Add post-OCR spell correction for common substitutions (l→J, v→e)
